title: Malveopsis vitifolia
taxonomy: Malveopsis vitifolia is a member of the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow or hibiscus family. This plant is a part of the order Malvales and the clade Rosids. Within the Malvaceae family, it is classified under the tribe Malveae. The genus Malveopsis is a relatively rare and lesser-known group within this family. Further research may be necessary to determine the exact classification of Malveopsis vitifolia.
